entryA.symptom: Data Box Disk cannot be opened after unlock - filesystem errors or RAW partition
entryA.solution: Disk is unusable. Collect diagnostic data, submit to PG, arrange re-shipment of replacement disk.

entryB.symptom: Azure Data Box Disk not mounted or accessible on Linux after rsync/system restart; NTFS partition corruption
entryB.solution: Run 'ntfsfix /dev/sdX' on the NTFS volume to fix common NTFS problems and reset journal, then remount and resume copy

conflicts.reasoning: 两个方案针对不同严重程度：ntfsfix 可修复日志损坏等轻度问题；若物理损坏或严重文件系统错误则需替换磁盘。两者并不互斥。
conflicts.recommendation: 指南中两个都保留，标注条件：轻度损坏先尝试 ntfsfix，严重损坏/物理故障则安排换盘

entryA.symptom: Data Box Disk unlock tool fails on Red Hat Enterprise Linux 7.x
entryA.solution: Refer to internal KB. Verify OS requirements, PowerShell version, prerequisites. Try alternative supported OS.

entryB.symptom: Unlocking Data Box Disk on RHEL 7.x fails with passkey error; dislocker-file not created
entryB.solution: Manually download epel-release RPM from valid URL, install dependencies, then re-run unlock tool

conflicts.reasoning: OneNote 给出通用指引（换 OS），ADO Wiki 给出具体修复（修复脚本中的 broken URL）。两个方案在不同场景下都有效。
conflicts.recommendation: 指南中先列 ADO Wiki 具体修复方案，OneNote 的换 OS 作为 fallback

entryA.symptom: Data Box POD Prepare to Ship fails with 'Scan completed with errors'
entryA.solution: Unlock device, download issues list from Connect and Copy page, resolve each error per naming/size conventions

entryB.symptom: Data Box Prepare to Ship error shows StorageRequestFailed
entryB.solution: Scenario 1: Follow KB for file rename issue. Scenario 2: Disable legal hold/immutable policy on destination SA

conflicts.reasoning: 同为 PtS 失败但根因不同：OneNote 描述通用数据不合规，ADO Wiki 描述特定的文件重命名冲突和 Legal Hold 策略。不同根因对应不同场景。
conflicts.recommendation: 指南中按根因分支列出，均保留
